metadata.summary: Fetch metrics and logs from various cloud providers and monitoring services

documentation:
# Rated Exporter SDK

The Rated Exporter SDK is a powerful and flexible Python library designed to fetch metrics and logs from various cloud providers and monitoring services. It provides a unified interface to interact with different data sources, making it easier for developers to build cross-platform monitoring and analytics tools.

## Features

- Unified API for multiple cloud providers and monitoring services
- Comprehensive error handling and standardized error types across providers
- Type hints for better IDE support and code quality
- Extensible architecture allowing easy addition of new data sources


## Supported Providers

- AWS CloudWatch
- Datadog
- Prometheus
- Google Cloud Monitoring
- Azure Monitor
- (More providers coming soon)

## Installation

You can install the Rated Exporter SDK using pip:

```bash
pip install rated-exporter-sdk
```

## Quick Start

You can see examples of how to use the Rated Exporter SDK in the [examples](examples) directory.


## Contributing

We welcome contributions to the Rated Exporter SDK! Please see our [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) file for details on how to get started.

## License

This project is licensed under the MIT License - see the [LICENSE.md](LICENSE.md) file for details.

## Support

If you encounter any issues or have questions, please file an issue on our [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/rated-network/rated-exporter-sdk/issues).

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.core.exceptions.RatedExporterBaseError
documentation: Base exception class for Rated Exporter SDK.

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.core.exceptions.AuthenticationError
documentation: Raised when there's an authentication problem.

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.core.exceptions.ConfigurationError
documentation: Raised when there's a configuration issue.

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.core.exceptions.APIError
documentation: Raised when there's an error in API communication.

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.core.exceptions.DataSourceError
documentation: Raised when there's an issue with a specific data source.

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.core.exceptions.QueryError
documentation: Raised when there's an error in query execution or parsing.

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.errors.PrometheusAPIError
documentation:
Raised when Prometheus API returns an error.

Attributes:
    message: Error message
    status_code: HTTP status code
    response: Raw API response
    query: Original query that caused the error

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.errors.PrometheusQueryError
documentation:
Raised when there's an error in PromQL query syntax or execution.

Attributes:
    message: Error message
    query: The invalid query
    position: Position in query where error occurred

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.errors.PrometheusConnectionError
documentation:
Raised when there's an error connecting to Prometheus.

Attributes:
    message: Error message
    url: The URL that failed
    original_error: The original exception

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.errors.PrometheusTimeoutError
documentation:
Raised when a Prometheus query times out.

Attributes:
    message: Error message
    timeout: The timeout value that was exceeded
    query: The query that timed out

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.errors.PrometheusValidationError
documentation:
Raised when there's a validation error in Prometheus configuration.

Attributes:
    message: Error message
    parameter: The invalid parameter
    value: The invalid value

documentation: Set up GCP credentials

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.managed.gcloud_auth.GCPPrometheusAuth._get_fresh_token
documentation: Get a fresh token, refreshing if necessary

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.managed.gcloud_auth.GCPPrometheusAuth.get_auth_headers
documentation: Override to ensure fresh token
Extended PrometheusAuth with GCP token refresh capabilities

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.auth.PrometheusAuth

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.auth.PrometheusAuth.__post_init__
documentation: Validate authentication configuration after initialization.

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.auth.PrometheusAuth._validate_auth_config
documentation: Validate authentication configuration.

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.auth.PrometheusAuth._validate_ssl_config
documentation: Validate SSL/TLS configuration.

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.auth.PrometheusAuth.get_auth_headers
documentation:
Generate authentication headers based on configuration.

Returns:
    dict: Headers to be included in requests

Raises:
    AuthenticationError: If token file cannot be read

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.auth.PrometheusAuth.get_ssl_config
documentation:
Get SSL configuration for requests.

Returns:
    dict: SSL configuration parameters

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.auth.PrometheusAuth.from_env
documentation:
Create authentication configuration from environment variables.

Environment variables:
    PROMETHEUS_USERNAME: Basic auth username
    PROMETHEUS_PASSWORD: Basic auth password
    PROMETHEUS_TOKEN: Bearer token
    PROMETHEUS_TOKEN_FILE: Path to token file
    PROMETHEUS_SSL_VERIFY: Whether to verify SSL (true/false)
    PROMETHEUS_SSL_CERT: Path to SSL certificate
    PROMETHEUS_SSL_KEY: Path to SSL key
    PROMETHEUS_CA_CERT: Path to CA certificate

Returns:
    PrometheusAuth: Authentication configuration

Authentication configuration for Prometheus.
Supports basic auth, token auth, and SSL/TLS configuration.

documentation: Instant vector: collection of samples at a single time

documentation: Range vector: collection of samples over time

documentation: Single numeric value

class_variables.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.types.MetricValueType.HISTOGRAM

Query options for Prometheus queries.

All time-based parameters accept datetime objects for type safety.
Step parameter uses the Step class for validation.

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.types.MetricMetadata
documentation: Represents metadata about a Prometheus metric.

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.types.TargetHealth
documentation: Enumeration of possible Prometheus target health states.

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.types.Target
documentation: Represents a Prometheus monitoring target.

classes.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.__init__
documentation:
Initialize Prometheus client.

Args:
    base_url: Base URL of Prometheus instance
    auth: Authentication configuration
    timeout: Default timeout for requests in seconds
    max_retries: Maximum number of retries for failed requests
    retry_backoff_factor: Backoff factor between retries
    pool_connections: Number of connection pools to maintain
    pool_maxsize: Maximum size of each connection pool
    max_parallel_queries: Maximum number of parallel queries

Raises:
    PrometheusValidationError: If configuration is invalid

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient._make_request
documentation:
Make HTTP request to Prometheus API.

Args:
    method: HTTP method
    endpoint: API endpoint
    **kwargs: Additional request parameters

Returns:
    Dict containing API response

Raises:
    PrometheusConnectionError: If connection fails
    PrometheusAPIError: If API returns an error
    PrometheusTimeoutError: If request times out

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.query
documentation:
Execute an instant query against Prometheus.

Args:
    query: PromQL query string
    options: Query options

Returns:
    PrometheusQueryResult containing query results

Raises:
    PrometheusQueryError: If query is invalid
    PrometheusAPIError: If query execution fails

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.query_range
documentation:
Execute a range query against Prometheus.

Args:
    query: PromQL query string
    options: Query options (must include start_time, end_time, and step)

Returns:
    PrometheusQueryResult containing query results

Raises:
    PrometheusQueryError: If query is invalid
    PrometheusAPIError: If query execution fails

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient._execute_single_query
documentation:
Execute a single query with error handling.

Args:
    query: PromQL query string
    options: Query options

Returns:
    PrometheusQueryResult or None if query fails or returns no data

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.query_batch
documentation:
Execute multiple queries in parallel.

Args:
    queries: List of PromQL query strings
    options: Query options to apply to all queries

Returns:
    List of PrometheusQueryResult objects or None for failed queries or queries with no data

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.stream_query_range
documentation:
Stream results for a range query in chunks.

Args:
    query: PromQL query string
    options: Query options
    chunk_size: Time duration for each chunk

Yields:
    PrometheusQueryResult for each chunk

Raises:
    PrometheusQueryError: If query is invalid
    PrometheusValidationError: If options are invalid

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient._parse_response
documentation:
Parse Prometheus API response into PrometheusQueryResult.

Args:
    response: Raw API response

Returns:
    PrometheusQueryResult containing parsed metrics

Raises:
    PrometheusAPIError: If response parsing fails

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient._safe_convert_metric_type
documentation:
Safely convert raw metric type string to MetricValueType enum.

Args:
    raw_type: Raw metric type string from Prometheus

Returns:
    MetricValueType enum value

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.get_metric_metadata
documentation:
Get metadata about metrics.

Args:
    metric_name: Optional specific metric name to query

Returns:
    List of MetricMetadata objects

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient._get_metric_type
documentation:
Get the type of a metric by querying its metadata.

Args:
    metric_name: Name of the metric

Returns:
    MetricValueType of the metric

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.get_targets
documentation:
Get information about Prometheus targets.

Args:
    state: Optional filter by target health state

Returns:
    List of Target objects

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.get_series
documentation:
Get time series matching a query.

Args:
    match: List of series selectors
    start_time: Optional start time
    end_time: Optional end time

Returns:
    List of MetricIdentifier objects matching the selectors

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.check_query_exemplars
documentation:
Check if a query can return exemplars.

Args:
    query: PromQL query string
    start_time: Start time
    end_time: End time

Returns:
    bool indicating if query can return exemplars

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.health_check
documentation:
Check if Prometheus is healthy and accessible.

Returns:
    bool indicating if Prometheus is healthy

Raises:
    PrometheusConnectionError: If health check fails

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.get_config
documentation:
Get Prometheus configuration.

Returns:
    Dict containing Prometheus configuration

Raises:
    PrometheusAPIError: If config retrieval fails

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.get_flags
documentation:
Get Prometheus command-line flags.

Returns:
    Dict containing Prometheus flags

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.get_build_info
documentation:
Get Prometheus build information.

Returns:
    Dict containing build information

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.get_runtimes
documentation:
Get Prometheus runtime information.

Returns:
    Dict containing runtime information

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.get_tsdb_status
documentation:
Get TSDB status.

Returns:
    Dict containing TSDB status

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.get_wal_replay_status
documentation:
Get WAL replay status.

Returns:
    Dict containing WAL replay status

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.__enter__
documentation: Context manager entry.

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.__exit__
documentation: Context manager exit with cleanup.

methods.name: rated_exporter_sdk.providers.prometheus.client.PrometheusClient.close
documentation: Clean up resources.

Client for interacting with Prometheus API.

Features:
- Robust error handling and retries
- Query validation
- Batch querying capabilities
- Streaming support for large datasets
- Automatic rate limiting
- Connection pooling
